title: myosotis decumbens subsp. kerneri
intro: Myosotis decumbens subsp. kerneri, also known as Kern's yellow water lily or Kern's forget-me-not, is a type of flowering plant in the borage family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Myosotis decumbens subsp. kerneri include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory symptoms, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Myosotis decumbens subsp. kerneri can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
